{
  "name": "single-page-checkout",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "next": "14.2.3",
    "react": "^18",
    "react-dom": "^18",
    "@stripe/stripe-js": "^3.4.0",
    "@stripe/react-stripe-js": "^2.7.0",
    "stripe": "^15.7.0",
    "react-hook-form": "^7.51.4",
    "@hookform/resolvers": "^3.3.4",
    "zod": "^3.23.8",
    "zustand": "^4.5.2",
    "framer-motion": "^11.1.9",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "tailwind-merge": "^2.3.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5",
    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^18",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.3",
    "postcss": "^8",
    "autoprefixer": "^10"
  }
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{"name": "next"}],
    "paths": {"@/*": ["./*"]}
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

import type { Config } from 'tailwindcss'
const config: Config = {
  content: ['./app/**/*.{ts,tsx}', './components/**/*.{ts,tsx}'],
  theme: { extend: {} },
  plugins: [],
}
export default config
module.exports = { plugins: { tailwindcss: {}, autoprefixer: {} } }

export type CartItem = {
  id: string
  name: string
  price: number
  quantity: number
  image?: string
}

export type ShippingAddress = {
  firstName: string
  lastName: string
  address1: string
  address2?: string
  city: string
  state: string
  zip: string
  country: string
}

export type DeliveryOption = {
  id: string
  label: string
  description: string
  price: number
  days: string
}

export type ContactInfo = {
  email: string
  phone?: string
}

export type CheckoutStep = 'contact' | 'shipping' | 'delivery' | 'payment' | 'review'

export type PromoResult = {
  valid: boolean
  discount: number
  message: string
}

import { create } from 'zustand'
import type { CartItem, ContactInfo, ShippingAddress, DeliveryOption, CheckoutStep } from '@/types/checkout'

const STEPS: CheckoutStep[] = ['contact', 'shipping', 'delivery', 'payment', 'review']

const MOCK_CART: CartItem[] = [
  { id: '1', name: 'Classic White Tee', price: 29.99, quantity: 2 },
  { id: '2', name: 'Slim Chinos', price: 79.99, quantity: 1 },
]

const DELIVERY_OPTIONS: DeliveryOption[] = [
  { id: 'standard', label: 'Standard Shipping', description: 'Delivered in 5-7 business days', price: 5.99, days: '5-7 days' },
  { id: 'express', label: 'Express Shipping', description: 'Delivered in 2-3 business days', price: 14.99, days: '2-3 days' },
  { id: 'overnight', label: 'Overnight', description: 'Next business day delivery', price: 29.99, days: '1 day' },
]

type CheckoutState = {
  cart: CartItem[]
  deliveryOptions: DeliveryOption[]
  activeStep: CheckoutStep
  completedSteps: Set<CheckoutStep>
  contact: ContactInfo | null
  shipping: ShippingAddress | null
  delivery: DeliveryOption | null
  promoCode: string
  promoDiscount: number
  tax: number
  clientSecret: string | null
  orderComplete: boolean
  setActiveStep: (step: CheckoutStep) => void
  completeStep: (step: CheckoutStep, data?: unknown) => void
  setContact: (data: ContactInfo) => void
  setShipping: (data: ShippingAddress) => void
  setDelivery: (option: DeliveryOption) => void
  setPromo: (code: string, discount: number) => void
  setTax: (tax: number) => void
  setClientSecret: (secret: string) => void
  setOrderComplete: () => void
  subtotal: () => number
  total: () => number
}

export const useCheckoutStore = create<CheckoutState>((set, get) => ({
  cart: MOCK_CART,
  deliveryOptions: DELIVERY_OPTIONS,
  activeStep: 'contact',
  completedSteps: new Set(),
  contact: null,
  shipping: null,
  delivery: null,
  promoCode: '',
  promoDiscount: 0,
  tax: 0,
  clientSecret: null,
  orderComplete: false,

  setActiveStep: (step) => set({ activeStep: step }),

  completeStep: (step) => {
    const idx = STEPS.indexOf(step)
    const next = STEPS[idx + 1]
    set((s) => ({
      completedSteps: new Set([...s.completedSteps, step]),
      activeStep: next || step,
    }))
  },

  setContact: (data) => set({ contact: data }),
  setShipping: (data) => set({ shipping: data, tax: 0 }),
  setDelivery: (option) => set({ delivery: option }),
  setPromo: (code, discount) => set({ promoCode: code, promoDiscount: discount }),
  setTax: (tax) => set({ tax }),
  setClientSecret: (secret) => set({ clientSecret: secret }),
  setOrderComplete: () => set({ orderComplete: true }),

  subtotal: () => get().cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0),
  total: () => {
    const s = get()
    return s.subtotal() + (s.delivery?.price ?? 0) + s.tax - s.promoDiscount
  },
}))

export { STEPS }

import { z } from 'zod'

export const contactSchema = z.object({
  email: z.string().email('Please enter a valid email'),
  phone: z.string().optional(),
})

export const shippingSchema = z.object({
  firstName: z.string().min(1, 'First name is required'),
  lastName: z.string().min(1, 'Last name is required'),
  address1: z.string().min(5, 'Address is required'),
  address2: z.string().optional(),
  city: z.string().min(1, 'City is required'),
  state: z.string().min(2, 'State is required'),
  zip: z.string().regex(/^\d{5}(-\d{4})?$/, 'Invalid ZIP code'),
  country: z.string().min(2, 'Country is required'),
})

export type ContactFormData = z.infer<typeof contactSchema>
export type ShippingFormData = z.infer<typeof shippingSchema>

'use client' import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form' import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod' import { contactSchema, type ContactFormData } from '@/lib/validations/checkoutSchemas' import { useCheckoutStore } from '@/store/checkoutStore' import { cn } from '@/lib/utils' export default function ContactSection() { const { setContact, completeStep, contact } = useCheckoutStore() const { register, handleSubmit, formState: { errors } } = useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(contactSchema), defaultValues: contact ?? {}, }) const onSubmit = (data: ContactFormData) => { setContact(data) completeStep('contact') } return (
{errors.email &&

{errors.email.message}

}

We'll send your order confirmation here. No account needed.

) }

🎉

Order Confirmed!

A confirmation has been sent to {contact?.email}

) } const Row = ({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) => (
{label} {value}
) const EditBtn = ({ step }: { step: CheckoutStep }) => ( ) return (

Contact

{contact?.email}

Shipping

{shipping?.firstName} {shipping?.lastName}

{shipping?.address1}{shipping?.address2 ? `, ${shipping.address2}` : ''}

{shipping?.city}, {shipping?.state} {shipping?.zip}

Delivery

{delivery?.label} — {delivery?.days} ({formatCurrency(delivery?.price ?? 0)})

{promoDiscount > 0 && }
Total{formatCurrency(total())}
) }

'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { useCheckoutStore } from '@/store/checkoutStore' import { formatCurrency } from '@/lib/utils' import PromoCodeInput from './PromoCodeInput' export default function OrderSummary() { const { cart, subtotal, delivery, tax, promoDiscount, total } = useCheckoutStore() const [open, setOpen] = useState(false) return (
{/* Mobile toggle */}

Order Summary

{cart.map(item => (

{item.name}

Qty: {item.quantity}

{formatCurrency(item.price * item.quantity)}
))}
Subtotal{formatCurrency(subtotal())}
Shipping {delivery ? formatCurrency(delivery.price) : '—'}
Tax{tax > 0 ? formatCurrency(tax) : '—'}
{promoDiscount > 0 && (
Discount-{formatCurrency(promoDiscount)}
)}
Total{formatCurrency(total())}
) }

import Link from 'next/link' export default function Home() { return (

ShopCo Demo Store

Experience our streamlined single-page checkout

Proceed to Checkout →
) }
